appDescription.message: Click DraftWise on a page to locally save form drafts and restore them after refreshes, crashes, or accidental tab closes.

draftFound.message: DraftWise found saved draft(s) on this page.

openPageFirst.message: Open a web page to manage site drafts.

dashboardSubtitle.message: Manage your autosave drafts, domain rules, and data backups.

urlRulesTitle.message: Granular Site Rules (one pattern per line, e.g. *://*.example.com/*)

blacklistPlaceholder.message:
Blacklist (Autosave will be disabled on matching URLs)
e.g. *://*.sensitive-site.com/*

whitelistPlaceholder.message:
Whitelist (If filled, autosave will ONLY run on matching URLs)
Leave empty to allow all sites except blacklist

confirmDeleteDraft.message: Are you sure you want to delete all drafts for this field?

confirmDeleteVersion.message: Are you sure you want to delete this historical version?

importError.message: Import failed. Invalid backup data format.
